## [00:00 - 01:21]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents and under two minutes. Dude, Demi and Ashton are getting a divorce. I am shocked. Come on, how many of you woke up that day when you saw that and you're like, oh my gosh, I cannot believe they're getting a divorce? Bro, the guy spends half his time in Vegas and the other half is on the Hollywood strip. What do you think is going to happen to you? Ashton, you're going to get a freaking divorce. And your comment about marriage is so difficult. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. Bro, please. It's hard because you're never fully committed. Everything that you and I do not fully commit to will become difficult at some point. I'm not getting a divorce from my wife, period. There is nothing she can do. Nothing she can screw up bad enough. Nothing she can possibly somehow walk in, spend money, broke something, overspent whatever, then I'm going to dump her over. It's not going to happen. I'm in it to win it. I'm in it for the long term. I know marriage is difficult. It's difficult to the level that you commit. When you commit, you're all in. And you have no back door. Everything gets easier. In every area of your life, we'll commit all the way, all the way, till death do us part. Be all in it to win it. Slam the door, slam the options, and things get easier.
